brands.name: Apple
brands.colorUsage: Black/white foundation. Blue ONLY for interactive elements (links, buttons). Never use blue for decorative purposes. Product images are the color — UI stays neutral. Dark mode inverts but maintains the same restraint.
brands.typographyScale: Hero: 96px/1.0/−0.003em • H1: 64px/1.05/−0.002em • H2: 48px/1.08/−0.002em • H3: 28px/1.14 • Body: 17px/1.47 • Caption: 12px/1.33. Headlines get tighter tracking, body gets looser.
brands.spacing: Base unit: 8px. Section padding: 100px desktop, 60px mobile. Component gaps: 16-24px. Generous whitespace is signature — when in doubt, add more space. Content max-width: 980px for text, full-bleed for product shots.
brands.components:
• Cards: Minimal borders, subtle shadows (0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04))
• Buttons: Pill-shaped (border-radius: 980px), 44px height minimum
• Product tiles: Full-bleed images, text below
• Navigation: Clean horizontal nav, no hamburger on desktop
• Hero: Single product, massive scale, minimal text
brands.motion: Smooth and elegant, never bouncy. Ease curves: cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1). Duration: 300-500ms for page transitions, 200ms for micro-interactions. Scroll-triggered reveals with subtle parallax. Product photos often have Ken Burns-style slow zoom.
brands.layout: Max-width: 980px for content, 1200px for product grids. Single column emphasis. Asymmetric hero layouts with product offset. Grid: 12-column, but often using 6-8 columns centered. Mobile: Full-width edge-to-edge.
brands.iconStyle: SF Symbols — consistent optical weight, multiple sizes (16/20/24/28), both outline and filled variants. Icons align to 1px grid. Never decorative, always functional.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Subtle color shift (blue → darker blue), no scale
• Focus: Blue outline ring (3px, offset 2px)
• Active: Slight darken
• Disabled: 50% opacity
• Links: No underline default, underline on hover
brands.copyVoice: Minimal, declarative statements. No exclamation points. Product names are proper nouns. Focus on what it does for you, not specs. 'The best iPhone ever.' not 'The iPhone with the most features!'
designPrinciples: Remove until you can't remove anymore
Product is the hero, UI disappears

brands.name: Stripe
brands.colorUsage: Purple for primary actions. Dark navy (#0A2540) for hero sections and headlines. Gradients (purple→cyan→pink) for illustration and visual interest, NEVER for UI components. Green only for success/positive states. Light gray for card backgrounds.
brands.typographyScale: Hero: 72px/1.1/−0.02em • H1: 56px/1.15/−0.02em • H2: 40px/1.2/−0.01em • H3: 24px/1.3 • Body: 18px/1.6 • Code: 14px/1.7 monospace. Headlines are tighter, body is open for readability.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Section: 120px vertical. Cards: 32px padding. Button: 12px 24px. Generous breathing room everywhere. Grid gap: 24-32px.
brands.components:
• Cards: Rounded corners (12px), subtle shadow, white background
• Buttons: Pill-shaped (9999px radius), purple fill, 48px height
• Code blocks: Dark background, syntax highlighted, copy button
• Tabs: Underline style, not pills
• Pricing tables: Clean grids, checkmarks for features
brands.motion: Smooth, professional. Spring animations for playful elements (illustrations). Staggered fade-ins for lists. Parallax on scroll for depth. Duration: 300-600ms. Ease: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1).
brands.layout: Max-width: 1080px content, 1440px page. 12-column grid. Hero: Often asymmetric with illustration right. Feature sections: 2-3 column grids. Mobile: Stack with full-width cards.
brands.iconStyle: Custom line icons, 24px default, 2px stroke, rounded caps. Consistent visual weight. Icons often have subtle gradient fills on hover.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Scale 1.02 for cards, color darken for buttons
• Focus: Purple ring (2px)
• Active: Scale 0.98
• Code blocks: Hover reveals copy button
• Links: Purple, underline on hover
brands.copyVoice: Technical but accessible. Developer-focused but not exclusionary. Confident without being arrogant. Uses 'you' frequently. Clear value props. 'Payments infrastructure for the internet.'
designPrinciples: Gradients for visual interest, not UI

brands.name: Twitch
brands.colorUsage: Purple is THE brand — use it for primary actions, glows, and accents. Red is ONLY for live indicators. Background is always dark. Cards are slightly lighter. Purple glow effects (box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(145,70,255,0.3)) for emphasis. Never use purple backgrounds for large areas.
brands.typographyScale: H1: 48px/1.2 • H2: 32px/1.25 • H3: 20px/1.3 • Body: 14px/1.5 • Small: 12px/1.4. Generally more compact than other brands — screens are info-dense.
brands.spacing: Base: 4px (tighter than most). Card padding: 12-16px. Section gaps: 24px. Sidebar width: 240px collapsed, 50px expanded. Content density is HIGH — lots of info on screen.
brands.components:
• Cards: Rounded (8px), dark surface, hover lightens
• Live badge: Red pill, white text, pulsing dot
• Avatar: Rounded square (8px radius), purple ring for live
• Chat: Dense message list, username colors, emote support
• Thumbnails: 16:9, rounded corners, live badge overlay
• Pills/tags: Small, rounded, category colors
brands.motion: Bouncy and energetic. Hover scales (1.05). Purple glow pulses. Transitions: 150-200ms. Ease: cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275) for bounce. Loading: Skeleton shimmer.
brands.layout: Dense 3-panel layout: Left nav (icons), Content (flexible), Right sidebar (chat). Grid of 4-6 stream thumbnails. Full-width video player. Mobile: Tabs for navigation, full-width player.
brands.iconStyle: Rounded, friendly. 20px default. 2px stroke. Filled on active state. Custom streaming icons (go live, raid, etc).
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Scale 1.05, purple glow, lighter background
• Focus: Purple outline ring
• Active: Scale 0.95
• Live: Pulsing red dot
• Following: Purple checkmark
• Buttons: Hover lightens, active darkens
brands.copyVoice: Casual, hyped, streamer culture. Uses slang (POG, hype, etc). Second person ('Start your stream'). Short, punchy. Exclamation points okay here! Community-focused.
designPrinciples: Dark mode only, no light mode

brands.name: Linear
brands.colorUsage: Purple for interactive elements and accents only. Pure black background. Surface colors create elevation hierarchy. High contrast text. Status colors (green/yellow/red) for issue states. No gradients in UI.
brands.typographyScale: H1: 32px/1.2/−0.02em • H2: 24px/1.25 • H3: 18px/1.3 • Body: 14px/1.5 • Small: 12px/1.4 • Mono: 13px/1.5. Compact scale for dense product UI.
brands.spacing: Base: 4px. Very tight spacing throughout. Sidebar: 12px padding. Cards: 12px padding. List items: 8px vertical. The product is DENSE but precisely spaced.
brands.components:
• Issues: Single-line items, status dot left, assignee right
• Sidebar: Collapsible, icon-only when collapsed
• Command bar (⌘K): Centered modal, fuzzy search
• Kanban: Tight columns, drag shadows
• Buttons: Small (28-32px height), rounded (6px)
brands.motion: Subtle and smooth. No bounce. 150-200ms duration. Ease: ease-out. Command bar: Scale + fade. Drag: Shadow appears. Transitions feel instant and responsive.
brands.layout: 3-panel: Sidebar (200px), List (flexible), Detail (400px). Dense issue lists. Full keyboard navigation. No wasted space. Mobile: Single panel with gestures.
brands.iconStyle: Crisp line icons, 16px default, 1.5px stroke. Custom status icons. Consistent with Inter's geometric style.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Background lightens (#252525 → #2a2a2a)
• Focus: Purple border (1px)
• Active: Slightly darker
• Selected: Purple left border accent
• Dragging: Elevated shadow, slight rotation
brands.copyVoice: Minimal, precise, developer-focused. No fluff. Feature names are verbs ('Track', 'Ship'). Confident but not arrogant. 'Built for the way you work.'

brands.name: Notion
brands.colorUsage: Warm, off-white background is signature (NOT pure white). Black for text. Colors are for tags, highlights, and accents — not structural. Block backgrounds can be colored. Callout blocks have colored backgrounds.
brands.typographyScale: H1: 40px/1.2 • H2: 30px/1.3 • H3: 24px/1.3 • Body: 16px/1.5 • Small: 14px/1.5. User can change default font to serif or mono. Page titles can be huge (60px+).
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Page padding: 96px sides on desktop. Block spacing: 4px between, 24px for headers. Generous margins. Content max-width: 708px centered (can be expanded).
brands.components:
• Blocks: Content units with hover actions (+ and ⋮⋮ handles)
• Callouts: Emoji + colored background box
• Toggles: Expandable sections with arrow
• Tables: Simple, Notion-style inline tables
• Kanban: Colorful cards, drag-and-drop
• Page icons: Emoji or uploaded image, 78px in page header
brands.motion: Subtle, content-focused. Block drag: Shadow + scale. Page transition: Slide. Toggles: Smooth expand (200ms). Everything feels lightweight and paper-like.
brands.layout: Content-first. Single column default. Sidebar (240px) collapsible. Pages can have cover images (full-width). 3-column layouts possible. Very flexible grid system for databases.
brands.iconStyle: Simple duotone icons, or emoji. Icons are 18-20px. Notion's custom icons are rounded, friendly. Heavy use of emoji as icons.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Show block handles, light background
• Focus: Blue outline for inputs
• Drag: Shadow + slight rotation
• Selected: Light blue highlight
• Editable: Blinking cursor
brands.copyVoice: Warm, friendly, creative. 'Write, plan, organize.' Uses second person. Encouraging but not pushy. Celebrates creativity and flexibility.

brands.name: Spotify
brands.colorUsage: Green for PLAY and primary actions only. Black background always. Album art provides color. Duotone overlays on playlists (gradient from album colors). Never green backgrounds. White text on dark.
brands.typographyScale: Hero: 96px/1.0/−0.04em • H1: 48px/1.1 • H2: 24px/1.25 • Body: 14px/1.5 • Small: 11px/1.4. Big and bold for content, small for metadata.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Card gaps: 24px. Playlist grid: 16px gap. Navigation: 16px padding. Album art: various sizes (48px in lists, 232px in player).
brands.components:
• Cards: Album art dominant, text below, rounded corners (4-8px)
• Play button: Green circle with black triangle
• Progress bar: Thin, green fill
• Playlist headers: Dynamic gradient from album art
• Player bar: Fixed bottom, full-width
brands.motion: Smooth, music-responsive. Album reveals: Fade + scale. Play button: Bounce on click. Equalizer bars animate. Now Playing: Album art glow. Duration: 200-300ms.
brands.layout: Grid-based music library. Sidebar (left nav), Content (flexible), Now Playing (bottom bar). Responsive grid: 2-6 columns based on width. Full-screen Now Playing mode.
brands.iconStyle: Simple, rounded icons. 24px default. Music-specific (play, shuffle, repeat). Consistent stroke weight. Filled when active.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Play button appears over album, card scales 1.04
• Focus: White outline ring
• Active: Scale 0.97
• Playing: Green bars animation
• Liked: Green heart fill
brands.copyVoice: Casual, music-focused. Playlist names can be playful. 'Made For You.' 'Your Daily Mix.' Genre-specific tone. Celebratory ('You're in!')
